title: Vite configuration file generator
description: Generate a vite.config.ts file for a project.

project.description: The name of the project in which to generate a vite config.
project.x-prompt: To which project would you like to add a Vite configuration file?

coveragePath.description: Specify a path to write coverage reports, relative to the workspace root. This option is ignored if 'includeTest' is false.

formats.description: Module formats produced by the build process. This option is ignored if 'includeBuild' is false.

globals.description: Allow vitest to inject jest-like API's into the testing environment.

includeBuild.description: Include build configuration in the generated file.

includeTest.description: Include configuration for Vitest in the generated file.

inSourceTests.description: Include setup for writing tests directly in source code files, rather than creating separate *.spec files.

react.description: Indicate that the project uses React.js.

rollupExternals.description: An array of values to add to the `rollupOptions.external` configuration field.

skipTsconfigs.description: Skip updating the project's tsconfig.json files.

swc.description: Use the SWC compiler instead of babel.

target.description: Build targets. This option is ignored if 'includeBuild' is false.

testEnvironment.description: The testing environment for the project.

testReportPath.description: Specify a path to write unit test reports, relative to the workspace root. This option is ignored if 'includeTest' is false.

tsconfigName.description: Set the filename to use in the configuration for `vite-plugin-dts`. If unspecified, the generator will use the project's 'projectType' configuration value to create a file name.

worker.description: Indicates whether the project uses workers.
